item.title: Rescued kittens in Qatar 🇶🇦 we found these babies scattered on a park and they were freezing cold & wet! I got scared another cat could eat them so I took them to feed them & keep them warm! We waited to see if any cat approached them and nothing happened
item.description: By @marion_esquivel: Rescued kittens in Qatar 🇶🇦 we found these babies scattered on a park and they were freezing cold & wet! I got scared another cat could eat them so I took them to feed them & keep them warm! We waited to see if any cat approached them and nothing happened
